sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_f4a85da647a90f14ddbed940f26d432f
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.CG_InventoryCollector</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description>Coleta metadados de customizações da instância para o Customization Governance.</description><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>CG_InventoryCollector</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var CG_InventoryCollector = Class.create();
CG_InventoryCollector.prototype = {

    initialize: function() {
        this.EXCLUDED_SCOPES = gs.getProperty('cg.excluded_scopes', '');
        this.INVENTORY_TABLE = 'u_cg_inventory';
        this.results = {
            collected: 0,
            errors: []
        };
    },

    _addScopeExclusion: function(gr) {
        if (!this.EXCLUDED_SCOPES) return;
        var scopes = this.EXCLUDED_SCOPES.split(',');
        for (var i = 0; i < scopes.length; i++) {
            var scope = scopes[i].trim();
            if (scope) gr.addQuery('sys_scope', '!=', scope);
        }
    },

    _getUpdateSetInfo: function(sysId) {
        var result = {
            update_set: '',
            updated_on: '',
            updated_by: ''
        };
        try {
            var xml = new GlideRecord('sys_update_xml');
            xml.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', sysId);
            xml.orderByDesc('sys_updated_on');
            xml.setLimit(1);
            xml.query();
            if (xml.next()) {
                result.update_set = xml.getDisplayValue('update_set');
                result.updated_on = xml.getValue('sys_updated_on');
                result.updated_by = xml.getValue('sys_updated_by');
            }
        } catch (e) {
            gs.warn('CG_InventoryCollector: erro ao buscar update set para ' + sysId);
        }
        return result;
    },

    runFullInventory: function() {
        this._collectCustomTables();
        this._collectCustomFields();
        this._collectBusinessRules();
        this._collectClientScripts();
        this._collectUIPolicies();
        this._collectUIActions();
        this._collectScriptIncludes();
        this._collectScheduledJobs();
        this._collectFlows();
        this._collectRecordProducers();
        this._collectNotifications();
        this._collectInboundActions();
        this._collectSLAs();
        this._collectACLs();
        // v1.1.0
        this._collectReports();
        this._collectSPWidgets();
        this._collectCustomRoles();
        this._collectTransformMaps();
        this._collectDataSources();
        this._collectCatalogItems();
        this._collectUIPages();
        this._collectFlowActions();
        this._collectScopedApps();

        gs.info('CG_InventoryCollector: coleta concluida. Total: ' +
            this.results.collected + ' artefatos. Erros: ' +
            this.results.errors.length);
        return this.results;
    },

        }

    _saveRecord: function(data) {
        try {
            var inv = new GlideRecord(this.INVENTORY_TABLE);
            inv.addQuery('u_sys_id_ref', data.sys_id);
            inv.addQuery('u_category', data.category);
            inv.query();

            if (inv.next()) {
                inv.setValue('u_name', data.name);
                inv.setValue('u_label', data.label || data.name);
                inv.setValue('u_scope', data.scope);
                inv.setValue('u_table_name', data.table_name || '');
                inv.setValue('u_active', (data.active == 'true' || data.active === true || data.active == '1'));
                inv.setValue('u_is_customized', true);
                inv.setValue('u_update_set', data.update_set || '');
                inv.setValue('u_last_updated_on', data.updated_on || '');
                inv.setValue('u_last_updated_by', data.updated_by || '');
                inv.setValue('u_last_snapshot', new GlideDateTime());
                inv.update();
            } else {
                inv.initialize();
                inv.setValue('u_category', data.category);
                inv.setValue('u_name', data.name);
                inv.setValue('u_label', data.label || data.name);
                inv.setValue('u_scope', data.scope);
                inv.setValue('u_sys_id_ref', data.sys_id);
                inv.setValue('u_table_name', data.table_name || '');
                inv.setValue('u_active', (data.active == 'true' || data.active === true || data.active == '1'));
                inv.setValue('u_is_customized', true);
                inv.setValue('u_update_set', data.update_set || '');
                inv.setValue('u_last_updated_on', data.updated_on || '');
                inv.setValue('u_last_updated_by', data.updated_by || '');
                inv.setValue('u_last_snapshot', new GlideDateTime());

                var newId = inv.insert();
                if (!newId) {
                    throw new Error('insert() retornou vazio para ' +
                        data.category + ': ' + data.name);
                }
            }
            this.results.collected++;
        } catch (e) {
            this.results.errors.push(
                data.category + ': ' + data.name + ' - ' + e.message
            );
            gs.warn('CG_InventoryCollector erro: ' +
                data.category + ' - ' + data.name +
                ' | ' + e.message);
        }
    },

    type: 'CG_InventoryCollector'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>bruno.santos1@servicenow.com</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 03:42:32</sys_created_on><sys_id>f4a85da647a90f14ddbed940f26d432f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>9</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CG_InventoryCollector</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Customization Governance" source="36a07e0247690714ddbed940f26d43cf">36a07e0247690714ddbed940f26d43cf</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Customization Governance">36a07e0247690714ddbed940f26d43cf</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_f4a85da647a90f14ddbed940f26d432f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>bruno.wurzius</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-25 03:58:48</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include><sys_es_latest_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><id>f4a85da647a90f14ddbed940f26d432f</id><sys_created_by>bruno.santos1@servicenow.com</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 03:42:32</sys_created_on><sys_id>9789956e47a90f14ddbed940f26d43a5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>bruno.santos1@servicenow.com</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 03:42:32</sys_updated_on><table>sys_script_include</table><use_es_latest>true</use_es_latest></sys_es_latest_script></record_update>
